case_title: VIDA PEJMAN VS. SALINA ZAOUI et al

docket_entries.description: PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-07-2010.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEJMAN, VIDA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATOR EDWARD GERARD MANNION APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-08-2010 THROUGH JAN-06-2011.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-28-2010.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-16-2010 BEFORE HEARING; DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION ON FILE.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE FEB-07-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEJMAN, VIDA AS TO DEFENDANT ZAOUI, SALINA BOUABIBSA, MOKHTAR DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-30-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-15-2010
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN LEON BOOS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAOUI, SALINA BOUABIBSA, MOKHTAR
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BELVIN KENT SMITH.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM FRANCIS MCLAUGHLIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-29-2010 THROUGH JAN-27-2011.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAOUI, SALINA BOUABIBSA, MOKHTAR

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-27-2010. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-16-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-30-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
